research_practices.title: Stay Up-to-Date with the Latest Research
research_practices.description: Regularly review papers, articles, and research reports to stay current on the latest advancements
practices: Review papers from top-tier conferences: NIPS, IJCAI, ICML, NeurIPS
Explore resources: arXiv, ResearchGate, Academia.edu
Subscribe to research newsletters and AI/ML journals
Follow leading AI/ML researchers on academic platforms
Attend webinars and conferences when possible

algorithm_exploration.title: Explore Different Machine Learning Algorithms
algorithm_exploration.description: Investigate various ML algorithms to determine best fit for use cases
practices: Study supervised learning algorithms (linear regression, decision trees, SVM, neural networks)
Study unsupervised learning algorithms (clustering, dimensionality reduction, anomaly detection)
Study reinforcement learning techniques (Q-learning, policy gradient, actor-critic)
Analyze strengths and weaknesses of each algorithm class
Document algorithm applications and performance metrics
Create comparison matrices for different use cases

hyperparameter_tuning.title: Improve Model Performance with Hyperparameter Tuning
hyperparameter_tuning.description: Optimize hyperparameters to significantly improve model performance and reduce overfitting
practices: Use grid search for systematic hyperparameter exploration
Use random search for faster exploration in large spaces
Use Bayesian optimization for efficient sampling
Implement cross-validation for robust evaluation
Track all hyperparameter experiments and results
Use early stopping to prevent overfitting
Monitor performance metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC)

transfer_learning.title: Use Transfer Learning and Pre-Trained Models
transfer_learning.description: Leverage existing models to save time and resources while achieving better results
practices: Identify suitable pre-trained models for your domain
Fine-tune models for specific tasks rather than training from scratch
Use model zoo resources (HuggingFace, TensorFlow Hub, PyTorch Hub)
Document fine-tuning strategies and performance gains
Experiment with different freeze/unfreeze strategies for layers
Use domain-specific pre-trained models when available

explainability.title: Investigate Explainability Techniques
explainability.description: Understand how models make predictions to identify biases and improve transparency
techniques: SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) - feature importance and prediction explanations
LIME (Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations) - local model approximations
Saliency maps - visual importance of input features
Feature importance scores - for tree-based models
practices: Apply explainability techniques to understand model decisions
Identify and document potential biases in predictions
Create visualizations of model explanations
Use explanations to improve training data quality
Document findings and recommendations

data_augmentation.title: Use Data Augmentation and Generation
data_augmentation.description: Increase dataset diversity and quantity through augmentation and synthetic generation
augmentation_techniques: Image augmentation: rotation, flipping, color jittering, zooming, shifting
Text augmentation: paraphrasing, back-translation, synonym replacement
Audio augmentation: time-stretching, pitch-shifting, noise injection
generation_techniques: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) - generate synthetic samples
Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) - learn and generate from data distribution
Language models - generate synthetic text data
practices: Apply domain-appropriate augmentation techniques
Monitor for augmentation artifacts that introduce bias
Use generative models to balance imbalanced datasets
Document augmentation parameters and strategies
Validate that augmented data improves model performance

code_reflection.title: Reflect on Your Code
code_reflection.description: Regularly review codebase to identify improvements
practices: Review code structure and architecture weekly
Identify areas for refactoring and optimization
Check for duplicate code and DRY violations
Analyze performance bottlenecks using profiling
Review error handling and edge cases
Check code documentation and clarity

apply_refactors.title: Apply Refactors
apply_refactors.description: Implement suggested improvements and monitor impact
practices: Create feature branches for refactoring changes
Apply one refactor at a time for clear impact analysis
Monitor performance metrics before and after
Run full test suite after each refactor
Document performance impact and improvements
Update code comments and documentation

skip_decision.title: Skip Refactors
skip_decision.description: Defer changes when impact is uncertain
practices: Document why a refactor was skipped with reasoning
Set reminder to revisit skipped refactors quarterly
Maintain list of deferred improvements
Prioritize based on actual performance impact
Focus on critical path optimizations first

sleep_cycle.title: Sleep Cycle
sleep_cycle.description: Maintain clean and organized storage system
practices: Clear unnecessary data weekly
Archive old interaction logs monthly
Remove duplicate entries from memory
Optimize database indexes periodically
Monitor storage utilization

consolidate_memories.title: Consolidate Memories
consolidate_memories.description: Refine knowledge base by consolidating and deduplicating
practices: Review knowledge base monthly for duplicates
Consolidate similar information into unified entries
Improve categorization and tagging
Update outdated information
Create better cross-references between concepts
